case_title: TIMBERLAKE, RON VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO C/O MAYOR'S OFF.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TIMBERLAKE, RON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO C/O MAYOR'S OFF. $150.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $180.00, ALTHOUGH THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF DID NOT OBTAIN THE NECESSARY PERMIT TO POST HIS SIGN, PLAINTIFF'S VIOLATION IS MITIGATED BY THE APPARENT SELECTIVE ENFORCEMENT OF THE ORDINANCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEFT/APPELLANT,CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, FILED WITHDRAWAL OF NOTICE OF APPEAL.

TRIAL BRIEF OF DEFENDANT,CCSF AND DECLARATION OF GLORIA K. SPURGEON-SMITH FILED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $276.47 FILED BY TIMBERLAKE, RON AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO C/O MAYOR'S OFF. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
